520 BUAC - Accounting and Information Assurance

BUAC764 Tax II: Taxation of Corporations & Other Entities (2 Credits) Students have the opportunity to gain an understanding of the basic tax competencies required for determining the appropriate tax structure for businesses; issue identification; active listening; solving tax problems. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUAC758V or BUAC764.
